languages.text: 32-ой меровский полк на долгие годы стал надежной военной опорой династии фон Валанциус. Попасть в его ряды мог любой желающий — но жизнь и обучение на Заркове становилась испытанием, которое не всякий мог пройти.

The 32nd Merov Regiment became the backbone of the von Valancius dynasty's armed forces for many years. Enlisting in the regiment was open to anyone, but the trial of living and training on Zarkov weeded out many hopefuls.
languages.original_text: 32-ой меровский полк на долгие годы стал надежной военной опорой династии фон Валанциус. Попасть в его ряды мог любой желающий — но жизнь и обучение на Заркове становилась испытанием, которое не всякий мог пройти.

traits.locale_text: The 32nd Merov Regiment became the backbone of the von Valancius dynasty's armed forces for many years. Enlisting in the regiment was open to anyone, but the trial of living and training on Zarkov weeded out many hopefuls.

The 32nd Merov Regiment became the backbone of the von Valancius dynasty's armed forces for many years. Enlisting in the regiment was open to anyone, but the trial of living and training on Zarkov weeded out many hopefuls.

The 32nd Merov Regiment became the backbone of the von Valancius dynasty's armed forces for many years. Enlisting in the regiment was open to anyone, but the trial of living and training on Zarkov weeded out many hopefuls.

languages.text: 32番メローヴ連隊は、フォン・ヴァランシウス家の軍隊の支柱として長年活躍した。連隊への入隊は誰でも可能だったが、ザルコフでの生活と訓練の試練を乗り越えた者は限られていた。
languages.original_text: The 32nd Merov Regiment became the backbone of the von Valancius dynasty's armed forces for many years. Enlisting in the regiment was open to anyone, but the trial of living and training on Zarkov weeded out many hopefuls.

traits.locale_text: 32番メローヴ連隊は、フォン・ヴァランシウス家の軍隊の支柱として長年活躍した。連隊への入隊は誰でも可能だったが、ザルコフでの生活と訓練の試練を乗り越えた者は限られていた。

languages.text: 多年来，梅罗夫第32团一直是冯·瓦兰修斯王朝武装力量的骨干。虽说任何人都可报名参军，但扎尔科夫上严酷的生活和训练会淘汰大多数怀揣希望的人。
languages.original_text: The 32nd Merov Regiment became the backbone of the von Valancius dynasty's armed forces for many years. Enlisting in the regiment was open to anyone, but the trial of living and training on Zarkov weeded out many hopefuls.

traits.locale_text: 多年来，梅罗夫第32团一直是冯·瓦兰修斯王朝武装力量的骨干。虽说任何人都可报名参军，但扎尔科夫上严酷的生活和训练会淘汰大多数怀揣希望的人。

languages.text: Le 32e régiment de Merov devint le pilier des forces armées de la dynastie von Valancius pendant de nombreuses années. Bien que le recrutement fût ouvert à tous, la vie sur Zarkov et la période de formation imposée aux nouveaux soldats étaient si rudes que de nombreux candidats renonçaient rapidement à s'enrôler.
languages.original_text: The 32nd Merov Regiment became the backbone of the von Valancius dynasty's armed forces for many years. Enlisting in the regiment was open to anyone, but the trial of living and training on Zarkov weeded out many hopefuls.

traits.locale_text: Le 32e régiment de Merov devint le pilier des forces armées de la dynastie von Valancius pendant de nombreuses années. Bien que le recrutement fût ouvert à tous, la vie sur Zarkov et la période de formation imposée aux nouveaux soldats étaient si rudes que de nombreux candidats renonçaient rapidement à s'enrôler.

languages.text: El 32.º regimiento de Merov fue un pilar de las fuerzas armadas de la dinastía von Valancius durante muchos años. Cualquiera podía alistarse en el regimiento, pero la vida y el entrenamiento en Zarkov acababan con las esperanzas de muchos.
languages.original_text: The 32nd Merov Regiment became the backbone of the von Valancius dynasty's armed forces for many years. Enlisting in the regiment was open to anyone, but the trial of living and training on Zarkov weeded out many hopefuls.

traits.locale_text: El 32.º regimiento de Merov fue un pilar de las fuerzas armadas de la dinastía von Valancius durante muchos años. Cualquiera podía alistarse en el regimiento, pero la vida y el entrenamiento en Zarkov acababan con las esperanzas de muchos.

languages.text: 32. Merov Alayı, uzun yıllar boyunca von Valancius hanedanlığının silahlı kuvvetlerinin bel kemiği oldu. Alaya katılım herkese açıktı ancak Zarkov'da yaşama ve eğitim alma sınavı, pek çok adayı eledi.
languages.original_text: The 32nd Merov Regiment became the backbone of the von Valancius dynasty's armed forces for many years. Enlisting in the regiment was open to anyone, but the trial of living and training on Zarkov weeded out many hopefuls.

traits.locale_text: 32. Merov Alayı, uzun yıllar boyunca von Valancius hanedanlığının silahlı kuvvetlerinin bel kemiği oldu. Alaya katılım herkese açıktı ancak Zarkov'da yaşama ve eğitim alma sınavı, pek çok adayı eledi.

languages.text: Das 32. Mervo-Regiment wurde viele Jahre lang das Rückgrat der bewaffneten Streitkräfte der Dynastie derer von Valancius. Der Beitritt in das Regiment stand allen Freiwilligen offen, aber die harten Lebensbedingungen und das Training auf Zarkov ließ viele Bewerber verzagen.
languages.original_text: The 32nd Merov Regiment became the backbone of the von Valancius dynasty's armed forces for many years. Enlisting in the regiment was open to anyone, but the trial of living and training on Zarkov weeded out many hopefuls.

traits.locale_text: Das 32. Mervo-Regiment wurde viele Jahre lang das Rückgrat der bewaffneten Streitkräfte der Dynastie derer von Valancius. Der Beitritt in das Regiment stand allen Freiwilligen offen, aber die harten Lebensbedingungen und das Training auf Zarkov ließ viele Bewerber verzagen.
